# Doc templates (`docs/templates/`)

Starter markdown with **frontmatter** aligned to [../documentation-policy.md](../documentation-policy.md).

| Template | Tags | Use |
| --- | --- | --- |
| [document.md](document.md) | `--public`, `--published` | General public page |
| [course.md](course.md) | `--student` | Lesson shell |
| [obf-component.md](obf-component.md) | `--public`, `--published` | OBF component sheet |
